activated_rules.rule_name: LC exception (Letter of Credit) not applied
General goods description with invoice reference
Linkage of goods to multiple origins
EU origin normalization including multiple origins

consignor.invoice_value:
SKF Eurotrade AB
415 50 Goteborg, Sweden
SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'SKF Eurotrade AB' from Sweden in the certificate is exactly identified in the invoice as 'SKF Eurotrade AB' with matching address city and country, after normalization of case and minor spacing differences. Rule 4.1.0 applied allowing consignor name presence anywhere in invoice text and address matches per 4.1.4. No contradictions found.

consignee.motivation: The consignee 'Technotorg-Don LLC' with full address and country Ukraine matches exactly between certificate and invoice. Invoice contains a clear 'Bill to' and 'Sold to' field with this name and address, fulfilling prioritization rules in 4.2.0. The country matches per 4.2.3.

goods_description.certificate_value:
WATER PUMP,WHEEL BEARING KIT,OTH KIT COMPONENTS,
SUSPENSION TRACK CONTROL ARM BUSH
goods_description.invoice_value: WATER PUMP,WHEEL BEARING KIT,OTH KIT COMPONENTS,SUSPENSION TRACK CONTROL ARM BUSH
goods_description.motivation: Article numbers from the certificate are explicitly present and matched in the invoice; however the goods description in the certificate is general with a reference to the invoice (rule 4.3.5). The certificate references invoice RB6604204 dated 2023-02-28, matching invoice details, enabling acceptance of general description. The certificate lists multiple origins (DE,ESP,ITA,TUR,CHN,TWN) linked to goods in invoice, fulfilling 4.3.7. Full exact product description text is not identically formatted but matches after normalization and cross-verification with article numbers. However some differences in formatting and comma separation exist, prompting conservative MANUAL_REVIEW.

quantity.certificate_value:
GW in KGS
844,96
NW in KGS
714,30
quantity.invoice_value:
Total Gross Weight
844,96 KG
Total Net Weight
714,30 KG
quantity.motivation: Gross Weight and Net Weight values in the certificate (844.96 KG and 714.30 KG) appear explicitly in invoice total weight fields with matching units and values, after normalizing decimal comma usage. Both invoice and certificate specify weights with units and categories, fully satisfying verification requirements including tolerance rules.

origin.invoice_value: Germany, Spain, Italy, Turkey, China, Taiwan
origin.motivation: All certificate-origin countries DE (Germany), ESP (Spain), ITA (Italy), TUR (Turkey), CHN (China), TWN (Taiwan) explicitly appear as line origins in the invoice under 'Country of Manufacturing'. The invoice explicitly states EU origin in text consistent with certificate's 'European Union' combined with multiple country origins. China and Taiwan are considered equivalent in normalization. No conflicts found.

manual_review_triggers: 4.3.3 - Controlled goods description text normalization and subtle formatting differences require human assessment
overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match or are acceptable with allowed normalization. Goods description requires manual review due to general description with invoice reference and formatting differences.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Varubeskrivningen i certifikatet är generell och hänvisar till fakturan, vilket kräver manuell granskning. Övriga kontroller, inklusive avsändare, mottagare, kvantitet och ursprungsland stämmer och kan verifieras. En manuell kontroll behövs för att säkerställa att varubeskrivningen är korrekt.
